footer.brand_desc: Handcrafted 3D-printed lamps from Svetlana Lampe studio.

configurator.configure_hint: This combination is pre-filled — adjust any detail before ordering
configurator.select_parts: Choose a base and shade to start
configurator.render_disclaimer: Images are 3D renders — actual colors and textures may vary.
configurator.specs_content: Light source: LED E27 (included) · Voltage: 220–240V · Cable length: ~200 cm · Switch: Inline on/off
configurator.shipping_content: Free shipping on all orders · Home delivery: 3–7 business days · Pickup point: 2–5 business days
configurator.safety_content: All Svetlana lamps are CE certified and meet European safety standards
configurator.care_content: Wipe gently with a dry or slightly damp cloth · Avoid harsh chemicals · Use only LED bulbs (max 10W E27)
configurator.error_loading: Failed to load configurator. Please refresh.
configurator.no_products: No products configured yet. Please add products via the admin.

configurator_product.notice_body: This lamp is built to order. Use the configurator to choose your base shape, shade shape, colors, cable, and bulb — then add it to your cart.

cart_delivery.title: Delivery method
cart_delivery.pickup_desc: Choose from thousands of pickup points
cart_delivery.made_to_order: Made to order — please allow a few extra days for crafting

why.heading: Why Svetlana
why.item1_body: Every lamp is carefully crafted and hand-finished for precision and unique character
why.item2_body: All our lamps meet European safety standards. Quality and safety you can trust
why.item3_body: Free shipping on all EU orders. Your lamp arrives safely to your door

meta.default_description: Handcrafted 3D-printed designer table lamps. Design your own — infinite color and shape combinations, made to order.
meta.home_description: Colourful, made-to-order table lamps you design yourself. Endless color and shape combinations, one simple price.
meta.configurator_description: Use the 3D lamp configurator: choose your base, shade, colors, cable and bulb, then order your one-of-a-kind lamp.
